response.original_title: Morse, Portnoy, Gillette, Hubauer & Friends: Live in Cancun 2022
response.overview: In mid-July, Mike, Bill, Eric and I played a set of songs at a friend’s 40th birthday party in Cancun. Now as you know, we don’t normally do party gigs but… for one night only, we played some stuff we’ve never done before. In addition to songs by Spock’s Beard, Flying Colors, and NMB, we did a bunch of covers and jam material, and we were joined by Melody Portnoy and Julie Harrison. We didn’t plan to release this, but when I realized it was recorded on audio and video, I thought this would be a great thing to share with the Inner Circle – a true one-off performance that you’ll not get anywhere else!  Tracklist:  01. Intro #1  02. Wild World  03. On Broadway  04. Intro #2  05. What You Leave Behind  06. Meine Kleiner Grüner Kaktus  07. Your Place In The Sun  08. Intro #3  09. Back In The USSR  10. Intro #4  11. It Don’t Come Easy  12. Oh Darling  13. Kayla  14. Cesar Mendiburu/ Happy Birthday  15. Wind At My Back
response.title: Morse, Portnoy, Gillette, Hubauer & Friends: Live in Cancun 2022
